rationale: Multiple network connections from an external IP (23.93.242.200) to the internal host-01.corp.local on RDP port 3389 are observed (A0, EV-001-EV-022). The connections are not initiated by the internal host and are handled by svchost.exe, which is legitimate for RDP. However, the high volume of connections from a single external IP to RDP suggests a potential brute-force or reconnaissance attempt.
